title: Amtech G1615 160mm (6") x 13mm (0.5") Tuck pointer trowel with soft grip
features: DURABLE: This 160mm (6") x 13mm (0.5") tuck pointer trowel has a hardened and tempered carbon steel blade for durability
VERSATILE AND COMFORTABLE TO USE: With a soft grip handle for a comfortable grip, it is an essential tool for pointing joints between brickwork
SIZE CAPACITY: 6 inch / 5 inch / 160 mm / 13 mm range ideal for household and trade applications
COMPACT DESIGN: Suitable for confined or hard-to-reach spaces
HOUSEHOLD & PROFESSIONAL USE: Suitable for DIYers and tradespeople alike
description: Product Description Am-Tech DIY and Tool products come with a twelve month guarantee and are built for the rigors of the typical English home owner and the DIY jobs expected. The range includes a comprehensive range of hand tools for every job. Am-Tech also offer a range of power tools that not only provide a reliable level of service, but also look great as a present or gift in colour boxes and double blister displays. Am-Tech produces their products from the best materials possible and at the best cost to ensure you are getting a real value for money offering. Safety Warning Attention!
